findings_history.notes: Maintenance scan.
graphStyles.ts 29 assertions.
warnIfNotDestroyed + createBatchDraw: 11 tests.
116 tests. eslint-disable. StickyNotesLayer memo. useCallback.
75 tests. safeReleasePointerCapture extracted.
143 tests. Fixed ChangeHistoryPanel memo syntax.
102 tests (MoreActionsDropdown, GraphShortcutsDialog, GraphMultiSelectBar).
116 tests (MicroGraphPanel, GraphSkeleton). 100% file coverage.
64 tests. Fixed nodeContextMenu backdrop. mindmapApi service tests. Zero assertion failures.
Fixed useGraphInit.helpers.test.ts Vite transform error. Added mindmapAiApi.ts contract tests (11 tests). 69 files / 2270 tests.
140 new tests. Hardened performance flake. 72 files / 2410 tests.
92 new tests + devWarn helper, 33 callsites refactored. 74 files / 2507 tests.
AiTutorPanel coverage 20→48. Fixed 2 silent-crash i18n bugs. 74 files / 2537 tests.
GraphTemplatePanel coverage 21→47. Fixed 3rd silent-crash i18n bug. 74 files / 2563 tests.
GraphSidebar coverage 27→58. Defect-class regression EXPANDED — caught 4 more silent-crash sites. 74 files / 2588 tests.
useDragConnect coverage 35→67. Pointer-state-machine pinned. 74 files / 2620 tests.
NodeAnnotationModal coverage 16→47. Save/delete/scroll-lock pinned. 74 files / 2651 tests.
useGraphInit coverage 32→88. 7 layout configs pinned tunable-by-tunable. 74 files / 2707 tests.
useEdgeReconnect coverage 30→65. Sister hook to useDragConnect fully pinned. 74 files / 2742 tests.

MiniKnowledgeGraph coverage 18→62 (was lowest test:src ratio at 0.45 after AiTutorPanel deepened): added 44 tests. Replicated buildNodeStyle as a pure function with full property pinning (focal=40px / non-focal=28px sizing, focal lineWidth=3 wins over isCustom=2 wins over default=1.5, MASTERY_HEX/MASTERY_HEX_LIGHT mapping for non-custom, primary[50]/primary[500] palette for user-created, [6,3] dashed border for custom, focal shadowBlur=10 + matching shadowColor, label truncated at 14 chars with Inter 10pt bottom). Replicated dataKey hash with identity properties (deterministic for same data, sensitive to id changes, length-prefixed to detect prefix-collisions,

empty case, intentionally order-sensitive for cache invalidation, O(N) at 1000 nodes <1ms). Mobile padding switch (8 vs 16 at <400px). Radial layout tunables (unitRadius=60 / nodeSize=30 / preventOverlap, animation:false, behaviors=[zoom-canvas+drag-canvas only], circle/line minimal renderers, autoFit:'view'). ResizeObserver loop guard (prevSizeRef cached dimensions, w>0 && rh>0 gate, !== check, Math.round to ignore sub-pixel jitter). justInitializedRef invariant (skip first run after init, deps=[focalNodeId, ready, data.nodes]). Empty-data handling (returns null + destroys stale graph for memory-leak fix). Edge style 4-tier color precedence (customColor → primary[500] → CONNECTION_TYPE_MAP → text.disabled). Dynamic aria-label embedding node count. Result: 74 files / 2786 tests, ALL PASSING.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 2786/2786 assertions pass; both micro/mini/full graph variants now fully contract-tested at the buildNodeStyle level
